examples: He was admitted to be such by all I ever heard speak of my parentage.
The ruling, though it may yet be reversed, sets aside the principle that biology is the primary determinant of parentage.
He was born of Anglo-American parentage.
Of German and Lebanese parentage, Carol is a postulant, on the long path to nunhood.
For several years I-flex's parentage also prevented its full-blown entry in the U.S. market.
